title: GitHub Slack app sign-in confirmed
text: The GitHub Slack app confirmed the account zakariaomar1983-sudo was already signed in after the /github signin command.

title: GitHub Slack app command scope limitation
text: The GitHub Slack app clarified it can only create GitHub issues or pull requests in this mode, and cannot run general shell commands like cd your_project_directory.

title: Speakeasy watch command request
text: After the message speakeasy run --watch, the GitHub Slack app asked for target repository and whether the change should be a new script or a CI/CD workflow update.

title: Default repository can be configured in Slack
text: The GitHub Slack app guidance says you can run @GitHub settings in the same channel/DM to set a default repository used when prompts do not explicitly include owner/repo.
